name: Don't shoot politics
short_description: 2d shooter game where mission is to shoot items to collect points and avoid shooting politics
detailed_description:
STORY:

2d shooter game where mission is to shoot different items. Shooting appearing items gives player points. There are several items like ducks, bottles, balloons which gives player more points. Every level there is time limit and shooting clock player get more time, but avoid shooting appearing politics, because shooting politics reduce level time 7 seconds. Game contains 7 levels with increasing speed and difficulty

FEATURES:

- 7 levels with increasing speed

  • Steam achievements
